# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `FR-004`
- Title: `Publish display-only reviews section`
- Persona/Actor: `Prospective client`
- Value statement: `For prospective clients, deliver a curated reviews section to achieve increased trust and social proof.`
- Context: `Browsing the brand page after reviewing services and project examples.`
- Problem statement: `Without visible testimonials, prospective clients lack third-party validation of quality and outcomes.`
- Expected outcome: `Visitors see a curated set of static review cards before or near the contact section.`
- Success metric(s): `Reviews section renders without errors; at least one review record validates against schema in CI.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Reviews section renders static testimonial cards from repository-local content records.`
  - `Each card includes reviewer name, review text, and optional project reference.`
  - `Invalid review records fail schema validation and block merge.`
- Non-goals: `Review submission workflow, moderation queue, spam scoring (Phase 3).`
- Constraints: `Static-first; display-only; no dynamic data ingestion in Phase 2.`
- Dependencies: `FR-002 project listing schema patterns, CR-001 contract governance.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Assumes review content is available and approved before Phase 2 delivery.`
- Validation approach: `Schema validation checks, build verification, section rendering smoke test.`
- Priority score: `75`
- Target window: `Phase 2`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#FR-004`
  - ADR: `n/a`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
